CustomField.description: The API name of the Opportunity field that receives the mapped value from the corresponding Payment field. When a Payment is created or updated, NPPatch copies the value from the Payment Field into this Opportunity field. The field must exist on the Opportunity object and its data type must be compatible with the source Payment field's data type. Used by the automatic Payment-to-Opportunity field mapping feature.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Opportunity field that receives the value copied from the mapped Payment field.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Field
